headline: Why Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of medical device company Zimmer Biomet (NYSE:ZBH) jumped 4.9% in the afternoon session after the company announced it increased its share repurchase expectations for fiscal year 2026.
